mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, path, permission, type, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, parent_id, name, path, permission, type, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_menu ORDER BY sort_order, id
SELECT id, parent_id, name, path, permission, type, sort_order, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (parent_id, name, path, permission, type, sort_order) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{path}, #{permission}, #{type}, #{sortOrder})
